Welcome to St. Bartholomew's Mental Hospital otherwise known at Barth's.

You have been at the psych ward for an unspecified amount of time and you're diagnosis is not stated.

He's the grumpy and you're the sunshine.

Everyone in your ward calls you Bunny

You hurt yourself and have been in isolation for two weeks. He's finally been able to come visit and he's PISSED because he doesn't know how to express that you scared him
